title: Device Home Screen - Charge Case battery charging icon
scenario: Verify Charge Case battery charging icon toggles correctly when charger is plugged in and unplugged on the Device Home Screen
steps: Launch the app and pair the device.
Check the battery icon — the Charge Case battery icon should show NO charging sign (both earbuds must be inside the Charge Case and the case must be opened for Tern and Emu).
Plug the charger into the Charge Case — the battery icon should display a charging sign.
Unplug the charger — the battery icon should show NO charging sign.
expected: 1. Charge Case battery icon shows NO charging sign when charger is not plugged in (with both earbuds inside the case and case opened for Tern and Emu).\n2. Charge Case battery icon displays a charging sign when charger is plugged in.\n3. Charge Case battery icon shows NO charging sign when charger is unplugged.
